title: Exploring the influence from whole blood DNA extraction methods on Infinium 450K DNA methylation
author: Hjorthaug, Hanne Sagsveen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: DNA from ten subjects was isolated by three different extraction methods (MagNA Pure LC, Autopure LS, and manual organic extraction), and DNA methylation was analyzed using the Infinium HumanMethylation 450K Bead Chip.
steps_raw: DNA from ten subjects was isolated by three different extraction methods (MagNA Pure LC, Autopure LS, and manual organic extraction), and DNA methylation was analyzed using the Infinium HumanMethylation 450K Bead Chip.
